items.name: Trade Federation Coin
items.notes: Used for custom bases and base decor at High Command Outpost.

items.name: Jedi Medallion
items.notes: Spent on Force powers. NPC sells for 100 Credits each.

items.name: Sith Medallion
items.notes: Spent on Force powers. NPC sells for 100 Credits each.

items.name: Mando Pistol
items.notes: Sidearm. Price may vary with included magazines.

items.name: DL-44 Blaster
items.notes: Reliable mid-range pistol.

items.name: Mando Blaster
items.notes: Higher demand among Mando RP players.

items.name: E-5 Blaster
items.notes: Accepts optics. Worth more with scopes.

items.name: E-11 Blaster Rifle
items.notes: Stormtrooper standard issue. Common but in steady demand.

items.name: Vibro Blade
items.notes: Color variants priced similarly unless rare.

items.name: Beskar Blade
items.notes: Beskar items hold value well.

items.name: Electro Staff
items.notes: Slower turnover; collector item.

items.name: Jedi Force Blade
items.notes: Faction-aligned buyers only.

items.name: Sith Warblade
items.notes: Faction-aligned buyers only.

items.name: Stormtrooper Helmet (any)
items.notes: Common variants. Rare paints can sell for much more.

items.name: Mandalorian Helmet (any)
items.notes: Wide variant range; price by visual rarity.

items.name: Beskar Chest Plate
items.notes: High-tier armor; demand from PvP players.

items.name: Clone Trooper Phase 2 Set
items.notes: Full set including helmet, chest, legs.

items.name: Darth Vader Helmet
items.notes: Display piece. Mostly collector value.

items.name: Mini Speeder Bike
items.notes: NPC buy price is 1,000 — small markup for delivery.

items.name: Endor Speeder Bike (colored variant)
items.notes: Red / Green / Blue variants trade slightly higher.

items.name: AT-ST
items.notes: Rare; price highly negotiable.

items.name: Beskar Ingot
items.notes: Core crafting material; price tracks Beskar gear demand.

items.name: Power Cell
items.notes: Common but constantly consumed.

items.name: Scrap Metal (stack)
items.notes: Bulk pricing; per stack of 10.

items.name: Bacta Patch
items.notes: Healing item; demand spikes during raid events.

items.name: Holocron
items.notes: Lore / display item.

items.name: Keycard (color varies)
items.notes: Higher tiers (red, gold) command more.

items.name: Lightsaber Crystal
items.notes: Color affects price; rare colors much higher.
